summary: Iteration 10 testing completed. All backend tests pass (17/17). Features tested: Page Builder CRUD, Phishing Stats API, Account Lockout, CMS Menu Manager removal, Export button colors. Frontend Page Builder UI verified working with create dialog and block types.
critical_code_review_comments: Page Builder UI works correctly - Create Page dialog opens with title, slug, description, page type, and block management
Export button colors verified in code: Excel=emerald-500/emerald-400 (green), PDF=#D4A836 (gold)
Menu Manager tab correctly removed from CMS - commented out with note 'Menu Manager tab moved to Settings page'
Phishing stats endpoint /api/phishing/stats returns aggregated statistics with total_campaigns, open_rate, click_rate etc.
Account lockout notification function implemented in email_service.py with proper HTML template
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features verified: Page Builder CRUD at /page-builder works with create/edit/delete pages and content blocks (heading, text, button, contact_form, event_registration). Phishing stats endpoint at /api/phishing/stats returns aggregated campaign statistics. CMS Menu Manager tab removed. Export buttons use emerald (Excel) and gold (PDF) colors.

account_lockout_notification.triggers: When user exceeds failed login attempts

cms_menu_manager_removal.verified: Menu Manager tab commented out in ContentManager.js line 585
